summary: Tested Room News Ticker (شريط أخباري) and News Reporter Role (إخباري الدوانية) features. Backend APIs all working correctly. Frontend news ticker UI verified working in دوانية rooms.

success_rate.backend: 100% (11 passed, 4 skipped due to no other participants in room)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test room 633fcdbc (دوانية ليفربول)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Room News and News Reporter features fully tested. Backend APIs: GET/POST/DELETE /api/rooms/{room_id}/news, POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/roles/{user_id} with news_reporter role, POST/DELETE /api/rooms/{room_id}/news-reporter/{user_id}. Frontend: News ticker appears in rooms with 'دوانية' in title, Add News modal works with categories (عاجل, تصريحات, انتقالات, نتائج, عام). UserRolesModal includes news_reporter role with cyan color.

room_news_ticker.details: News ticker appears at top of room page for rooms with 'دوانية' in title. Shows scrolling news with category indicators.

add_news_modal.details: Modal opens when clicking + button. Has category selection (عاجل, تصريحات, انتقالات, نتائج, عام) and text input. Submit button adds news to ticker.

news_reporter_role.details: news_reporter role defined in UserRolesModal with label 'إخباري' and cyan color. Backend validates and accepts this role.

backend_apis.GET /api/rooms/{room_id}/news: WORKING - Returns news items for room
backend_apis.POST /api/rooms/{room_id}/news: WORKING - Creates news with text and category
